ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Name of the employee */,
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job title held by the employee */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency employing the employee */,
  "weekly_hours" INTEGER /* Number of hours worked per week */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary of the employee */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of employment or salary change */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the employee is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the employee record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the employee record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_job_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_title_id") REFERENCES job_titles ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_titles" (
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Name of the job title */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Description of the job title */,
  "salary_scale" TEXT /* Salary scale for the job title */,
  "min_salary" TEXT /* Minimum salary for the job title */,
  "max_salary" TEXT /* Maximum salary for the job title */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the job title record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the job title record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "agency_description" TEXT /* Description of the agency */,
  "agency_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the agency */,
  "agency_head" TEXT /* Name of the agency head */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the agency record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the agency record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_management" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR personnel, department head, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role for which the permission is granted */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_postings" (
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job posting */,
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job title for the posting */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency for the posting */,
  "posting_date" TEXT /* Date of the job posting */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the job posting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("posting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_job_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_title_id") REFERENCES job_titles ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job application */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who applied */,
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting applied for */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date of the job application */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the job application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_posting_id FOREIGN KEY ("posting_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("posting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_history" (
  "salary_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary history record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary of the employee */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the salary became effective */,
  "salary_change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the salary change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
